text: <par>The last element <latinform>si</latinform> means 'round object; fruit' < PTB <reconstruction>*sey</reconstruction>.</par>

<par>KPM says: suppletive/causative <latinform>phen-e</latinform> 'to untie', <latinform>bene</latinform> 'to be loose'. Devoicing and aspiration triggered by <reconstruction>*s-</reconstruction>.</par>
